Class Player

java.lang.Object
com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Player extends Object implements Serializable
Mutable per-player state during a game: gem chips, reserved and purchased development cards, acquired nobles, running prestige total, and display metadata (id, human flag, name).
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(int playerID, boolean isHuman, String displayName)
      Parameters:
      playerID - stable numeric id
      isHuman - true for human-controlled seat
      displayName - trimmed to 48 chars; empty becomes "Player " + playerID

  • Method Details

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Returns:
      UI / log name

    • isHuman

      public boolean isHuman()
      Returns:
      true if this seat is human

    • getPlayerID

      public int getPlayerID()
      Returns:
      numeric player id

    • getPrestigePoints

      public int getPrestigePoints()
      Returns:
      prestige from cards and nobles

    • getTokens

      public ArrayList<Token> getTokens()
      Returns:
      live list of chips in hand (unordered)

    • getTokensSorted

      public List<Token> getTokensSorted()
      Returns:
      a new list of tokens ordered black, blue, green, red, white, then gold

    • getBoughtCards

      public ArrayList<Card> getBoughtCards()
      Returns:
      purchased development cards

    • getReservedCards

      public ArrayList<Card> getReservedCards()
      Returns:
      reserved cards (max three in rules)

    • getNobles

      public ArrayList<Noble> getNobles()
      Returns:
      nobles that have visited this player

    • addToken

      public void addToken(Token token)
      Parameters:
      token - chip to add to hand

    • addReservedCard

      public void addReservedCard(Card card)
      Parameters:
      card - reserved from table or deck

    • removeReservedCard

      public void removeReservedCard(Card card)
      Parameters:
      card - exact instance to remove from reserves

    • addBoughtCard

      public void addBoughtCard(Card card)
      Moves a card to the tableau and increases prestige by the card's points.
      Parameters:
      card - purchased card

    • addNoble

      public void addNoble(Noble noble)
      Parameters:
      noble - acquired noble tile

    • getGemTokenCount

      public int getGemTokenCount(int gemTypeIndex)
      Parameters:
      gemTypeIndex - 0=black … 4=white
      Returns:
      count of non-gold tokens of that colour

    • getGoldTokenCount

      public int getGoldTokenCount()
      Returns:
      number of gold (wildcard) tokens held

    • getBoughtCardsGemValueCount

      public int getBoughtCardsGemValueCount(int gemTypeIndex)
      Counts bought cards whose discount colour matches the given index (for purchase/noble math).
      Parameters:
      gemTypeIndex - 0=black … 4=white
      Returns:
      how many bought cards provide that gem discount

    • removePlayerTokens

      public void removePlayerTokens(int gemTypeIndex, int numberOfTokens)
      Removes non-gold or gold tokens by palette index without updating the bank (legacy/helper).
      Parameters:
      gemTypeIndex - 0–4 standard colours, 5 gold
      numberOfTokens - how many to remove from the end of matching tokens

    • deductTokens

      public void deductTokens(String gemType, int numberOfTokens)
      Removes up to numberOfTokens chips matching gemType from the player's hand only. The caller is responsible for returning those gems to GameSession.
      Parameters:
      gemType - e.g. "red" or "gold"
      numberOfTokens - maximum removals
